events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment complete — the wrong-cartridge-color condition is a fail. Written to `/app/answer.json`:

- **Decision:** fail (respiratory protection selection error under OSHA 1910.134/Subpart I; wrong cartridge color = wrong protection class for the actual contaminant)
- **Risk:** high — technician believes they're protected but isn't
- **Conditions:** installed-defective, non-compliant
- **Actions:** stop respirator-required work, swap in the correctly color-coded NIOSH-approved cartridge, verify approval label/service life/fit test, retrain on cartridge color coding
